prompt: I have secrets stored in Infisical and I want to automatically sync them to AWS Secrets Manager in us-east-1. My app reads secrets from AWS SM using the AWS SDK. Walk me through setting this up — what do I need to configure in Infisical?
assertions: Mentions App Connection as a prerequisite for the sync
Correctly identifies mapping behavior options (one-to-one vs many-to-one) which is specific to AWS SM
Recommends or mentions Key Schema for scoping managed secrets
Explains initial sync behavior options (overwrite vs import)
Mentions region configuration for the AWS destination
References auto-sync capability (secrets propagate on change)
